content: Why punish us with this heat aaa

#### it I'm making my thermostat really low

Love me some Popmie early in the morning <:pray:1356053116260454534>
even tho i dont play poowa anymore, but holy shiet this Hiyuki angle is so godly

Well he people of Pompeii didn't like it in the morning

WHAT <:dead:1356082627509092372> 
Just made my day lwk
The Pompeii kinda didn't make it the people's day gang
I wonder how much taxes the US  is forcing their civilians to give
Cause didn't they go to war a month ago or sum
uh we had tariffs but thats not related to the war
higher gas prices but thats like supply and demand not taxes
we had tax on imported stuff
I think my question has been answered thank
do you want a table of our tax rates or?
I wanna visit a relative of mine
And I worry about the god-awful tax rates they have
yeah we have progressive system for our income tax
so basically more u earn higher % they take
we got import tax but i think its supposed to be ended by our judicial system
gas is obv more expensive bcs war
uh beside that cant think of any other big one
some state have property tax, other have income tax
Guyss.. is it okay to ask what's the best.. like.. a gem Games you recommend guys?
Why can't i pick the charcters on duty and what mean It?
u mean u are finding new games?
like what genre u like or sth etc
You know... um it ight be rogouelike.. or mmo.. it can be gacha as well but not too intense cause my device can't run genshin
do u also like tower defense?

I playedd one of the crunchyroll games.. it is super good.. but they shutdown it.. It's stable on JP... I also played some yugioh duel links, gusrdian tales.. Summmoners war.. etc. Right now I play roguelike.. like Born again
I tried path to nowhere as well..
arknights has both tower defense and roguelike mode
oh I know that one... is that game good? cause I tried it.. So many texts
the game is one of the best
So far, the only old school dungeon scrolling RPG kind of thing on mobile that can be played for free is "Wizardry Variants Daphne" for me
kade recruiting ppl to grind hell
And might be hard to farm pull currency
It's better than recruiting into playing l*ague of legends
i havent been recruiting anyone to that trash
Basically anyone can be played on this game, problem is pull currency is utter trash
so it's like fear and hunger but on mobile?
It's not as punishing as fear and hunger
But it's harder than your average turn based games
but why noobisu call it's a trash?
He was talking about league of legends
lemme try the game you said
i called le*gue of legend trash
Just a fair warning, the grind is quite insane and you'll struggle to farm currency for pulls

i only call a game trash when i play it and it is trash
how to grind tho? is it automatic?
But if you stick around you can see the game can be fun because it's one of those rare game that if you don't read story you'll get stuck
have you played summoners war? is it like that grindy? cause I quit that game cause it's too grindy asf
I bought an account to play lol
There is a mode auto, but it's a bit bad, you only use it on trash mobs once you reach a decent levels, the auto need to be calibrated manually otherwise
I'll try arknights as well.. If i get bit a hang of it
<@783232273998544928> if u want a game that

since i downloaded the game, i have no trouble sleeping anymore
oh.. btw is your pfp a reverse 1999?

- best healer of the game
